records.body_djot: Visiting the PL and Graphics groups at Brown University to give a talk.
We have a [Dagstuhl on EGRAPHS](https://www.dagstuhl.de/seminars/seminar-calendar/seminar-details/26022)!
PLDI 2025 was a huge success! Many thanks to everyone who helped me out as Program Chair!!
[SIGPLAN Research Highlights featured our POPL paper on egg](https://www.sigplan.org/Highlights/Papers/)!
Gave a talk at Cornell's CS Colloquium on our work on equality saturation. Many thanks to [Nate](https://natefoster.org/) for hosting!
Excited to start this quarter as Full Professor!
Offered a week-long seminar at the [Marktoberdorf summer school](https://sites.google.com/view/marktoberdorf2024/home) on analysis and optimizations with equality saturation.
[Anjali][Anjali Pal] is presenting [Enumo](pubs/2023-oopsla-enumo/) at [OOPSLA 2023](https://2023.splashcon.org/track/splash-2023-oopsla).
[Edward][Edward Misback] is presenting [Odyssey](pubs/2023-uist-odyssey/) at [UIST 2023](https://uist.acm.org/2023/).
Released [Ian][Ian Briggs]'s Amazon internship project on [Haploid](https://github.com/IanBriggs/haploid), an [egg](https://egraphs-good.github.io/)-based SMT query simplifier.
I will be teaching [Emina][Emina Torlak]'s course on [Solver-aided Programming (CSE 507)](http://courses.cs.washington.edu/courses/cse507/23au/) this quarter!
[Edward][Edward Misback] is presenting [Odyssey](pubs/2023-uist-odyssey/) at [FPTalks 2023](https://fpbench.org/talks/fptalks23.html).
[Pavel][Pavel Panchekha] and I are co-organizing [FPTalks 2023](https://fpbench.org/talks/fptalks23.html).
[Yihong][Yihong Zhang] is presenting [egglog](pubs/2023-pldi-egglog/) at [PLDI 2023](https://pldi23.sigplan.org/details/pldi-2023-pldi/20/Better-Together-Unifying-Datalog-and-Equality-Saturation).
[Gus][Gus Smith] is presenting [Lakeroad](pubs/2023-plarch-lakeroad/) at [PLARCH 2023](https://pldi23.sigplan.org/details/plarch-2023-papers/7/Generate-Compilers-from-Hardware-Models-).
[Max][Max Willsey] and I are co-organizing [EGRAPHS 2023](https://pldi23.sigplan.org/home/egraphs-2023#program).
[Oliver][Oliver Flatt] is giving the first [egglog](pubs/2023-pldi-egglog/) demo at [EGRAPHS 2023](https://pldi23.sigplan.org/home/egraphs-2023#program).
[Yihong][Yihong Zhang] is giving a talk on [tree automata](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tree_automaton) at [EGRAPHS 2023](https://pldi23.sigplan.org/home/egraphs-2023#program).
[Anjali][Anjali Pal] and I are co-organizing [PNW PLSE 2023](https://sites.google.com/cs.washington.edu/pnwplseworkshop/pnw-plse-2023).
I was interviewed for the Business Insider article "[The end of coding as we know it](https://www.businessinsider.com/chatgpt-ai-technology-end-of-coding-software-developers-jobs-2023-4)".

[David][David Cao] is presenting [babble](pubs/2023-popl-babble/) at [POPL 2023](https://popl23.sigplan.org/details/POPL-2023-popl-research-papers/14/babble-Learning-Better-Abstractions-with-E-Graphs-and-Anti-unification).
[James][James Wilcox] and I are co-teaching [Grad PL (CSE 505)](http://courses.cs.washington.edu/courses/cse505/23wi/).

The Neutrons project was featured by the [CACM](https://cacm.acm.org/magazines/2017/8/219596-hacker-proof-coding/abstract), [UW Allen School](https://news.cs.washington.edu/2017/08/08/allen-schools-zachary-tatlock-and-neutrons-software-verification-project-featured-in-communications-of-the-acm/), and [UCSD CSE](https://cse.ucsd.edu/about/news/cse-trained-expert-program-verification-featured-communications-acm).
